<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/eval */ class EVAL_ extends RedisCommand { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'EVAL'; } /** * Calculates the SHA1 hash of the body of the script. * * @return string SHA1 hash. */ public function getScriptHash() { return sha1($this->getArgument(0)); } }
